Shift screen up/down (Press Select & Up/Down Pad 2) (ROM-Version 2.2 or higher required)
Level Select (Pause menu) (Press Select & X Pad 2)
Have all keys (Press L1 & R1 & Select) (ROM-Version 2.2 or higher required)
Have all weapons (Press L2 & R2) (ROM-Version 2.2 or higher required)
Have ammo all weapons (Press L1 & R1) (ROM-Version 2.2 or higher required)
